title: zephyranthes pedunculosa
intro: Zephyranthes pedunculosa, also known as the fairy lily or Zephyr lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is a perennial bulbous plant that grows in wetlands, producing white, pink, or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The fairy lily can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of tea, tincture, or decoction, which may provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and supporting immune function.
